about.name: Sebastien Dez
about.bio: Fullstack JavaScript developer with 12 years of experience, I combine the rigor of Clean Code with a human-centric mentoring approach (scrum master, junior mentoring). My expertise (Vue.js, NestJS, Angular, Nuxt) is at the service of the creation of durable solutions and the sharing of knowledge within teams. I apply an Artisan Developer approach based on "Bienvaillance" : the balance between human kindness (mentoring, user listening) and technical vigilance (rigor, maintenance, performance). My goal : deliver durable business value through clean code and a culture of continuous improvement.
